E:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\atm_gui_qt.dir/objects.a
D:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\atm_gui_qt.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\atm_gui_qt.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\atm_gui_qt.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o atm_gui_qt.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libatm_gui_qt.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\atm_gui_qt.dir\linkLibs.rsp
